ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_performance" (
  "job_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the job */,
  "elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Total elapsed time for the job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "num_maps" INTEGER /* Total number of map tasks */,
  "num_maps_kill" INTEGER /* Number of map tasks killed */,
  "num_maps_fail" INTEGER /* Number of map tasks failed */,
  "num_reducers" INTEGER /* Total number of reduce tasks */,
  "num_reducers_kill" INTEGER /* Number of reduce tasks killed */,
  "num_reducers_fail" INTEGER /* Number of reduce tasks failed */,
  "avg_map_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent in map phase */,
  "avg_shuffle_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent in shuffle phase */,
  "avg_merge_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent in merge phase */,
  "avg_reduce_time" INTEGER /* Average time spent in reduce phase */,
  "map_input_records" INTEGER /* Number of records read in map phase */,
  "map_input_size" INTEGER /* Size of input data read in map phase */,
  "reduce_input_records" INTEGER /* Number of records read in reduce phase */,
  "reduce_input_size" INTEGER /* Size of input data read in reduce phase */,
  "reducer_output_records" INTEGER /* Number of records written in reduce phase */,
  "reducer_output_size" INTEGER /* Size of output data written in reduce phase */,
  "reduce_groups" INTEGER /* Number of reduce groups */,
  "shuffled_maps" INTEGER /* Number of shuffled map outputs */,
  "am_node" TEXT /* AM node identifier */,
  "queue_name" TEXT /* Queue name */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Pool name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_performance_queue_name FOREIGN KEY ("queue_name") REFERENCES queue_config ("queue_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_performance_pool_name FOREIGN KEY ("pool_name") REFERENCES pool_config ("pool_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_details" (
  "job_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the job */,
  "submit_time" TEXT /* Time the job was submitted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the job started executing */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time the job finished execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., SUCCEEDED, FAILED) */,
  "user" TEXT /* User who submitted the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., MAPREDUCE, SPARK) */,
  "input_path" TEXT /* Input path for the job */,
  "output_path" TEXT /* Output path for the job */,
  "log_path" TEXT /* Log path for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_details_user FOREIGN KEY ("user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_performance" (
  "task_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the task */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the job this task belongs to */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., MAP, REDUCE) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the task started */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time the task finished */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., SUCCEEDED, FAILED) */,
  "input_records" INTEGER /* Number of input records processed by the task */,
  "output_records" INTEGER /* Number of output records produced by the task */,
  "input_size" INTEGER /* Size of input data processed by the task */,
  "output_size" INTEGER /* Size of output data produced by the task */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* Node where the task ran */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_performance_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_performance ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_nodes" (
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., ACTIVE, DOWN) */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory available on the node */,
  "cpu" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores available on the node */,
  "disk_space" INTEGER /* Disk space available on the node */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* OS version of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, DEVELOPER) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the job that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., LONG_RUNNING, TASK_FAILURE) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., CRITICAL, WARNING) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_performance ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "job_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the job */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the job was executed */,
  "elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Total elapsed time for the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_performance ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the task */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the task was executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the task started */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Time the task finished */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES task_performance ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_planning" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity plan */,
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the cluster */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date the plan is for */,
  "predicted_load" INTEGER /* Predicted load on the cluster */,
  "recommended_resources" TEXT /* Recommended resources to handle the load */,
  "utilization_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for utilization (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the node */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance is predicted for */,
  "predicted_issue" TEXT /* Predicted issue with the node */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to prevent the issue */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.9 for 90%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_maintenance_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES cluster_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the dashboard */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queue_config" (
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each queue */,
  "queue_name" TEXT /* Name of the queue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the queue */,
  "max_jobs" INTEGER /* Maximum number of jobs allowed in the queue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pool_config" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pool */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the pool */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the pool */,
  "max_jobs" INTEGER /* Maximum number of jobs allowed in the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)
